---
title: "Lectures"
---

Lecture slides will be posted here as the course progresses.

- [Incentives](incentives.qmd)
- [Markets and Their Failures](markets-failures.qmd)
- [Equity vs. Efficiency](equity-efficiency.qmd)
- [Uncertainty](uncertainty.qmd)
- [Quasi-Experiments](quasi-experiments.qmd)
- [Risk and Insurance](risk-insurance.qmd)
